name: Games to Learn Programming
short_description: This is a software for players to learn programming while making games. Players could learn programming from scratch by making some classic games, such as Life Game, Retro Snake, etc. There are some code templates built in. So players don't have to make a small game from scratch.
detailed_description: This is a software for players to learn programming while making games. Players could learn programming from scratch by making some classic games, such as Life Game, Retro Snake, etc. Then players need to make a little bit more complex game called Two Snakes, which requires players to play with two hands, or making an AI for another snake. Code templates for these games are built in. Players have to follow the tips to learn programming and change the code.
about_the_game: This is a software for players to learn programming while making games. Players could learn programming from scratch by making some classic games, such as Life Game, Retro Snake, etc. Then players need to make a little bit more complex game called Two Snakes, which requires players to play with two hands, or making an AI for another snake. Code templates for these games are built in. Players have to follow the tips to learn programming and change the code.
